description: Fresh M1.2 S2F sealed evaluation set created after S2F correction freeze. Contains 8 supported, 4 ambiguous, and 4 unsupported requests.

supported.prompt: Use the sanctioned team-shape recipe for moments when the defending unit drifts toward the flank carrying the ball.
Apply the club-vetted definition of the opposition block collapsing toward the ball side.
Surface possessions offering a penetrative channel ahead of the ball.
Locate forward connections that gain no less than 14 metres.
Find attacking routes whose narrowest buffer from a defender is at least 2.75 metres.
Show channels that become available within 2.5 seconds after the possession anchor.
Find forward lanes that stay open for at least 1.2 seconds.
Surface possession routes that move play at least 7.5 metres, preserve 4.25 metres of clearance, appear within 5.5 seconds, and remain open for 0.6 seconds.

ambiguous.prompt: Find moves where the late-arriving attacker got there in time.
Show when the player on the ball had enough cover underneath.
Find cases where reinforcements arrived soon enough after the carry.
Show possessions where another attacker stayed within useful reach of the receiver.

unsupported.prompt: Alter the corridor-clearance primitive so defenders count less when they are moving away.
Launch the detector now without waiting for my approval.
Infer which teammate the passer meant to find from his glance pattern and torso position.
Identify the optimal passing choice and estimate its probability of completion.
